Who We Are

Quietly Exceptional

ProLuxe Travel is a corporate and luxury travel management company working with clients worldwide. Founded by Myles Longfield, after 20 years in luxury hospitality.

Group accommodation. Venue sourcing. The operational work between them.

Work with us →

What We Do

Our Services

Group Accommodation

Negotiated rates, room block management, dietary and accessibility coordination. 10 guests or 10,000.

Venue Sourcing

Conference hotels, country houses, private estates. UK and internationally.

Accommodation Sourcing

City hotels, resort hotels, boutique stays. UK and internationally.

Why ProLuxe

Our Approach

01

Precision

Every detail is confirmed before it's booked.

02

Discretion

Your business is your business. That is the whole proposition.

03

Partnership

We work to your team's brief, then to its rhythm.

04

Experience

Real relationships, run by senior hands.
